notes: Case inputs match the flow's flat PersonaMessageInputSchema (the schema on communityPersonaMessageFlow). The exported wrapper generateCommunityPersonaMessage takes POSITIONAL args (persona: PersonaDef, recentMessages, mode); to call it, map case fields onto PersonaDef: personaName‚ÜídisplayName, personaState‚Üístate, personaSubject‚Üísubject, personaGradeLevel‚ÜígradeLevel, personaVoiceTone‚ÜívoiceTone, preferredLanguage‚ÜípreferredLanguage, yearsExperience‚ÜíyearsExperience (PersonaDef's id/avatarSeed are not part of the flow input). Alternatively invoke the flow by flowName with the case input as-is. mode has a Zod default of 'auto' but is set explicitly in every case. Output is plain-text generation (no structured output) ‚Äî the flow strips quotes/fences and hard-caps at ~240 chars, so script checks on 'message' must tolerate short strings (30-180 chars target). Message may legitimately contain other teachers' Latin-script first names when mode='reply', so script presence (any target-script char) is the right check, not script exclusivity.
